text: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 听录音,然后回答这个问题。

text: Why did the man need a phrasebook?
zh: 这个男人为什么需要一本短语手册?

text: Last week Mrs. Mills went to London.
zh: 上周,米尔斯夫人去了伦敦。

text: She does not know London very well, and she lost her way.
zh: 她对伦敦不太熟悉,迷路了。

text: Suddenly, she saw a man near a bus stop.
zh: 突然,她看见公交车站附近有个男人。

text: 'I can ask him the way,' she said to herself.
'Can you tell me the way to King Street, please?'
zh: “请问,你能告诉我去国王街怎么走吗?”
那个男人愉快地笑了笑。

text: Then he put his hand into his pocket, and took out a phrasebook.
zh: 接着,他把手伸进口袋,掏出一本短语手册。

text: He opened the book and found a phrase.
zh: 他翻开书,找到了一句话。
